rest: noun. Relief from work or activity by sleeping; sleep.

tor: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Togbo-Vara Banda.

torus: noun. The standard representation of such a space in 3-dimensional Euclidean space: a surface or solid formed by rotating a closed curve,
tress: noun. A braid, knot, or curl, of hair; a ringlet.

true: adjective. Conforming to the actual state of reality or fact; factually correct.
truer: adjective. comparative form of true: more true
trues: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of true
truss: noun. A bandage and belt used to hold a hernia in place.

user: noun. One who uses or makes use of something, a consumer or client or an express or implied licensee (free user) or a trespasser.
